title: Gallup Ecclesiastica 2011
description: The survey investigated religiosity and church membership of Finnish people as well as their participation in parish activities. Questions about faith, matters related to spirituality, religious communities, and family were asked. The respondents were first asked whether they were members of a church or other religious community.
